description: §23.6.1 E-FOREIGN-LANG-IN-PROGRAM — a file declares a top-level `<foreign lang="ts" />` block AND a top-level `<program lang="ts">`. `<foreign lang>` is the library-file surface (a file with `export` fns and NO `<program>`); the two do NOT stack (§23.6.1) — a program file carries `lang=` on `<program lang=>` (§23.2.1) instead. Fires E-FOREIGN-LANG-IN-PROGRAM (type-system.ts checkForeignLangLibraryDecl) and does NOT also fire the library-only DUPLICATE check.
